text:
There once was a cheerful fox named Felix. Felix loved nothing more than gazing out into the forest at night. One evening he spotted a twinkling star that resembled his favorite dessert: fluffy clouds dotted with chocolate chips.

Curiosity getting the better of him, Felix crept through the trees toward the bright gem. He reached it only to find it was glowing with a soft lavender light, beckoning him closer. Felix decided he couldn't resist such sweet dreams, and soon found himself sitting under that star.

Suddenly, a soft voice spoke from the lavender light.

"Fox, why haunt the moonlight? You have dreams as sweet as stars."

Felix blinked in surprise. A lovely owl with twinkling eyes perched calmly on a nearby branch.

"Hello? That sounded like someone speaking... chocolate?"

"The owl speaks," the owl responded. "You’re quite dear, Felix. Lost in chocolate dreams?"

Felix chuckled. "Oh yes, every night. I wish I could steal a
